notes:
v2.6.56 — Direction Lock: H4+H1 must both agree before any trade

- H1 hard block now ON by default (was off)
- If H4 = SELL and H1 = BUY: bot waits, no trade in either direction
- If H4 = SELL and H1 = SELL: only SELL breakouts allowed, BUY blocked
- Fixes counter-trend entries on small local trendlines during strong trends
- H4 direction detection improved: works with as few as 20 bars (no more silent bypass)
- Existing users: H1 block auto-enabled on first launch after update
